summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 18 warning, 16 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 bin/agt.mjs — `--no-simplify` not registered in CLI help; undiscoverable by users. SPEC explicitly requires it in `bin/agt.mjs`.
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:108 — `readFileSync(rolePath)` outside try/catch; missing `roles/simplicity.md` crashes the run. All other error paths fail open. Wrap in try/catch.
🟡 bin/lib/outer-loop.mjs — SPEC requires `--no-simplify` pass-through for multi-feature runs; not implemented.

🟡 tasks/task-1/artifacts/test-output.txt — Artifact references v1 API surface (`isCodeFile`, `getChangedFiles`, revert logic) that no longer exists. Review evals in tasks 2–4 assessed v1 code, not current v2. Re-capture artifacts.

🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:109` — `readFileSync(rolePath)` has no try/catch; every other I/O path in the function fails open, but this one will crash the feature run if the role file is missing. Add try/catch to match the fail-open pattern.
🟡 `task-1/handshake.json:7` — Builder claims "All 597 tests pass" but test output shows 587 total (585 pass, 2 skip, 0 fail). Summary count is wrong; no actual failures.
🟡 bin/agt.mjs:89 — `--no-simplify` not registered in CLI help; add to `run` subcommand flags
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs — No test for `--no-simplify` skip path; SPEC AC-9 requires it
🟡 simplify-eval.md — Stale FAIL verdict from pre-fix version; regenerate after fixes
All 9 acceptance criteria are now met. Three 🟡 items go to backlog.
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs — No test for `--no-simplify` skip flag; SPEC AC-5 explicitly requires this; flag logic at `run.mjs:1507-1521` verified by source only
🟡 bin/agt.mjs:89 — `--no-simplify` not listed in CLI help for `run` command; undiscoverable by users
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs — No integration test for simplify-before-finalize ordering; SPEC Testing Strategy requires "pass-triggers-before-finalize"
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:118 — Warning-only path checks return values but never verifies `simplify-eval.md` was written; gap between no-findings (verified absent) and critical (verified present)
- The fix loop cited as 🔴 in the prior engineer review (task-6) **is now implemented** — added in run_2 with 3 test cases
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:115 — Fail-open on dispatch failure logs to console but writes no persistent record; operator cannot distinguish "clean pass" from "gate bypassed"
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:175 — Empty `catch {}` silently discards `simplify-eval.md` write errors; review findings lost with no diagnostic
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:192 — Empty `catch {}` silently discards STATE.json write errors; metrics silently absent
🟡 `bin/agt.mjs:102` — `--no-simplify` not in CLI help text; users can't discover it (backlog)
